title: Skill-sync stage + preflight + mirror in onboard_bee.mjs, WITH its safety-critical behavioral tests in the same cell
action: Implement the skill-sync stage per approach.md (post-panel revision - re-read it) honoring D1-D5, AND land the safety-critical behavioral tests in the same cell (panel F7: destructive code and its proof are never separated). Implementation: (1) D2 resolution with the F2 identity proof: sourceRoot = path.dirname(HIVE_DIR) valid ONLY if realpath(HIVE_DIR) === realpath(sourceRoot/bee-hive), else blocked_no_source; target = path.join(os.homedir(), '.claude', 'skills') with NO override of any kind (F5, D1); realpath(source)===realpath(target) when both exist -> verify-only NOOP; ancestor overlap (one root strictly contains the other) -> fail-closed; absent target = fresh install (never realpath a nonexistent path). (2) D3 preflight at top of applyPlan, result visible in computePlan too: fallback-free version reader (never readBeeVersion's 0.1.0 fallback); ABSENT tree = fresh/proceed, EXISTING-but-unreadable = unknown = refuse; refuse iff source < host_helpers OR source < installed_skills OR any resolved-tree version unknown; refusal aborts the WHOLE apply pre-write (the post-loop onboarding.json rewrite must be unreachable), exit 1, zero mutations; --force-downgrade honored ONLY when all three versions resolved numeric (unknown/no_source never forceable) and a forced apply reports forced_downgrade:true + versions in its JSON (F9). (3) D4/D5 mirror: per-bee-* sorted manifest with sha256; sync_skill/remove_skill plan items incl. equal-version byte drift; deletion domain = /^bee-/ directory entries only; lstat everywhere, symlinks never followed; a bee-* entry that IS a symlink or any symlink inside a managed dir -> that skill is SKIPPED with a loud blocked_symlink report, never written/unlinked/deleted (F6 - a symlinked skill dir is plausibly a live checkout); unpredictable temp filenames inside the managed namespace; type collisions (non-link) = remove entry, write source shape. (4) CLI: statuses blocked_downgrade|blocked_no_source (plan mode exit 0, apply exit 1), versions+reason fields, --force-downgrade in parseArgs. Tests (same cell, suite already isolated by skill-sync-0): fence payload (non-bee sibling byte-identical after a deletion-bearing sync), zero-mutation refusal (tree hashes before/after, exit 1, three versions reported), symlink fail-closed at BOTH levels (panel-2 NEW-2): (i) a bee-* entry that is a symlink to an outside dir, (ii) a NESTED symlink inside a managed skill dir pointing outside - in both cases the link target's contents stay byte-identical and the skill is reported skipped; ancestor-overlap refusal (source root inside target root or vice versa) proven with zero mutations (tree hashes before/after), NOOP self-invocation (fake HOME whose .claude/skills IS the source copy), fresh install (absent target -> full sync). Fixture authority (F4): fake-source cases copy the launcher + relative deps into the fake skills/bee-hive tree and execute THAT copy.

truths: Preflight refusal (version/no-source) leaves repo AND target byte-identical incl. the post-loop onboarding.json write being unreachable - proven by the in-cell refusal test, not asserted
Fallback-free reader: unknown only for existing-but-unreadable trees and never forceable; absent trees mean fresh install and proceed
realpath identity anchors the source (F2); ancestor overlap fails closed; no production target override exists (F5)
Symlinked skill entries are skipped loudly, never traversed, unlinked, or deleted - proven by the in-cell symlink test
The non-bee fence payload test passes in this cell
Equal-version byte drift produces sync_skill items (D5)
Full isolated suite green (existing + new safety cases)
Nested-symlink and ancestor-overlap cases exist in this cell with zero-mutation/byte-identical assertions
prohibitions: Do not use the fallback readBeeVersion() for preflight decisions
No shell-outs; node fs APIs + path.join/os.homedir only
No production override env/flag for the target (D1/F5)
Never enumerate or write any path outside the repo and os.homedir()/.claude/skills
No assertion weakened to make the suite pass (frozen judge)

verify: node --check skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && grep -qF 'blocked_downgrade' skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs && grep -qF 'blocked_no_source' skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs && grep -qF 'forced_downgrade' skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs && ! grep -F 'BEE_SKILLS_TARGET' skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs

trace.outcome: Skill-sync stage landed in onboard_bee.mjs per approach.md: D2 realpath-identity source anchor with fixed os.homedir()/.claude/skills target (no override), verify-only NOOP on self-invocation, ancestor-overlap fail-closed; D3 fallback-free three-version preflight refusing pre-write with zero mutations (post-loop onboarding.json rewrite unreachable), absent=fresh vs existing-unreadable=unknown never forceable, --force-downgrade only all-numeric with forced_downgrade:true reporting; D4/D5 lstat-only bee-* manifest mirror with structural deletion fence, blocked_symlink loud skip at top and nested levels, unpredictable temp names; CLI statuses blocked_downgrade/blocked_no_source (plan exit 0, apply exit 1) with versions+reason. Safety-critical tests in the same cell: fence payload, zero-mutation refusal, both-level symlink fail-closed, ancestor overlap both directions, NOOP, fresh install, unknown-unforceable, force path. Suite 160 checks green.
